definitions.vi: Dùng để diễn tả điều gì đó là thật hoặc có thật.
definitions.es: Se utiliza para expresar que algo es verdadero o real.
definitions.en: Used to express something is true or real.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I am real, I have never seen this movie before.
She bought a real expensive bag last week.
I feel real happy to meet an old friend again.
notes_md:
**thiệt** = real, true, for real. It’s the Southern Vietnamese version of **thật**.

As an adjective, it describes something genuine or not fake. It also works like an adverb to mean “really,” adding emphasis to an adjective or verb.


It can also mean “to be at a disadvantage” or “to suffer a loss” (bị thiệt = be the one who loses out).

Strong memory link: **thiệt (South)** = **thật (North/standard)**.
notes:
thiệt = real, true, for real. It’s the Southern Vietnamese version of thật.

As an adjective, it describes something genuine or not fake. It also works like an adverb to mean “really,” adding emphasis to an adjective or verb.

It can also mean “to be at a disadvantage” or “to suffer a loss” (bị thiệt = be the one who loses out).

Strong memory link: thiệt (South) = thật (North/standard).
exampleSentences: Anh nói thiệt, anh chưa từng xem phim này trước đây.
Chị ấy mua một chiếc túi thiệt đắt tiền tuần trước.
Em cảm thấy thiệt vui khi được gặp lại bạn cũ.

translation.en: This is a really delicious dish.
